# services.couchdb

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.couchdb`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.couchdb.adminPass` | `null or string` | Couchdb (i.e. fauxton) account with permission for all dbs and tasks. |
| `services.couchdb.adminUser` | `string` | Couchdb (i.e. fauxton) account with permission for all dbs and tasks. |
| `services.couchdb.argsFile` | `absolute path` | vm.args configuration. Overrides Couchdb's Erlang VM parameters file. |
| `services.couchdb.bindAddress` | `string` | Defines the IP address by which CouchDB will be accessible. |
| `services.couchdb.configFile` | `absolute path` | Configuration file for persisting runtime changes. File needs to be readable and writable from couchdb user/group. |
| `services.couchdb.databaseDir` | `absolute path` | Specifies location of CouchDB database files (\*.couch named). This location should be writable and readable for the user the CouchDB service runs as (couchdb by default). |
| `services.couchdb.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable CouchDB Server. |
| `services.couchdb.extraConfig` | `attribute set` | Extra configuration options for CouchDB |
| `services.couchdb.extraConfigFiles` | `list of absolute path` | Extra configuration files. Overrides any other configuration. You can use this to setup the Admin user without putting the password in your nix store. |
| `services.couchdb.group` | `string` | Group account under which couchdb runs. |
| `services.couchdb.logFile` | `absolute path` | Specifies the location of file for logging output. |
| `services.couchdb.package` | `package` | The couchdb3 package to use. |
| `services.couchdb.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Defined the port number to listen. |
| `services.couchdb.uriFile` | `absolute path` | This file contains the full URI that can be used to access this instance of CouchDB. It is used to help discover the port CouchDB is running on (if it was set to 0 (e.g. automatically assigned any free one). This file should be writable and readable for the user that runs the CouchDB service (couchdb by default). |
| `services.couchdb.user` | `string` | User account under which couchdb runs. |
| `services.couchdb.viewIndexDir` | `absolute path` | Specifies location of CouchDB view index files. This location should be writable and readable for the user that runs the CouchDB service (couchdb by default). |
